{

    },
    {
      "expectation_id": "置信度达到0.95或以上",

      "expected_outcome": "confidence字段值 >= 0.95",
      "required_capabilities": ["置信度评估"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["confidence >= 0.95"],
      "boundary": {"scope": "single_turn_intent_recognition"},
      "priority": "中",
      "evidence_refs": []
    },
    {
      "expectation_id": "避免回退为other意图",

      "user_intent": "查询具有明确的业务意图，不应被归为兜底意图",

      "confidence": null,

    },
    {

      "score": 0,
      "expected_evidence": ["intent不是“other”"],

    }

      "incomplete": false

      "actual": {"subIntent": "其他意图"},
      "evidence_ref": "adapter_extraction",
      "raw": null,
      "incomplete": false
    }
  ],
  "evidence": [
    {"stage": "adapter_extraction", "data": {"intent": "other", "confidence": 0.5, "target_value": null, "subIntent": "其他意图"}}
  ],
  "reasoning_summary": "用户查询“帮我看看上季度买了重疾险的客户都是啥样的？”明显意图为分析特定保险产品的客户画像，预期意图customer_portrait且目标实体“重疾险”置信度高。但实际系统识别意图为“other”，置信度仅0.5，且未提取任何目标值，完全偏离业务预期。所有核心业务期望均未满足，整体判定为not_fulfilled。"
}
